meaning: n.[化](用硫代硫酸钠为滴定剂的)滴定碘法,碘定量法
examples: Methods The concentration of chlorine dioxide was determined by propandioic acid-iodometry and five-step iodometry.
This paper uses iodometry to measure solubility product of calcium iodate. Themethod is very simple, and the result is satisfactory.
Objective to improve five-step iodometry method for measuring chlorine dioxide in order to measure chlorine dioxide in disinfectants more accurately.
